MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, Clerks C. Amador/K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Noveo Mosser is present.
Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Mark Blackstock is present.
Laura Chiera representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date of September 27, 2007 is off calendar.
